productDisplayName: Timberland Men Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: Low-cut styling on the classic suede boot, this colour blocked timberland shoe is set to become your mainstay while braving the great outdoors. Aggressive outsole with terraced lugs and metal eyelets make this an adventurer's sartorialist dream. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo T-shirt.UpperLeather upper with strategically placed overlaysCentral lace ups with metal eyeletsPadded tongue for comfortPadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleFoam rubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with aggressive terraced lugsOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe as a toe guardShoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
